name: Network communication must use TLS 1.2 or higher
description: All network connections transmitting application data must use TLS 1.2 or higher. Plaintext HTTP, unencrypted database connections, and deprecated TLS versions (1.0, 1.1) are denied.

policy.rationale: TLS 1.0 and 1.1 have known vulnerabilities. Plaintext connections expose data to any observer on the network path. TLS 1.2+ is the minimum acceptable baseline as of 2024.
